'''thorachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fablelike|fablelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fablelike|fablelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thorachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorachithi|thorachithi]] || [[word:thorachiji|thorachiji]] || [[word:thorachishi|thorachishi]] || [[word:thorachiki|thorachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorachuthuthu|thorachuthuthu]] || [[word:thorachujuju|thorachujuju]] || [[word:thorachushushu|thorachushushu]] || [[word:thorachukuku|thorachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorachuthu|thorachuthu]] || [[word:thorachuju|thorachuju]] || [[word:thorachushu|thorachushu]] || [[word:thorachuku|thorachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorachufthuf|thorachufthuf]] || [[word:thorachufjuf|thorachufjuf]] || [[word:thorachufshuf|thorachufshuf]] || [[word:thorachufkuf|thorachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorachethe|thorachethe]] || [[word:thoracheje|thoracheje]] || [[word:thoracheshe|thoracheshe]] || [[word:thoracheke|thoracheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorachothotho|thorachothotho]] || [[word:thorachojojo|thorachojojo]] || [[word:thorachoshosho|thorachoshosho]] || [[word:thorachokoko|thorachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorachotho|thorachotho]] || [[word:thorachojo|thorachojo]] || [[word:thorachosho|thorachosho]] || [[word:thorachoko|thorachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorachofthof|thorachofthof]] || [[word:thorachofjof|thorachofjof]] || [[word:thorachofshof|thorachofshof]] || [[word:thorachofkof|thorachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfthĂŻf|thorachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfjĂŻf|thorachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfshĂŻf|thorachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfkĂŻf|thorachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thorachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thorachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thorachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thorachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfthĂŻf|thorachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfjĂŻf|thorachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfshĂŻf|thorachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfkĂŻf|thorachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfthĂŻf|thorachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfjĂŻf|thorachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfshĂŻf|thorachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorachĂŻfkĂŻf|thorachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorachĂŠthĂŠ|thorachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thorachĂŠjĂŠ|thorachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thorachĂŠshĂŠ|thorachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thorachĂŠkĂŠ|thorachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorachathatha|thorachathatha]] || [[word:thorachajaja|thorachajaja]] || [[word:thorachashasha|thorachashasha]] || [[word:thorachakaka|thorachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorachatha|thorachatha]] || [[word:thorachaja|thorachaja]] || [[word:thorachasha|thorachasha]] || [[word:thorachaka|thorachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorachafthaf|thorachafthaf]] || [[word:thorachafjaf|thorachafjaf]] || [[word:thorachafshaf|thorachafshaf]] || [[word:thorachafkaf|thorachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thorachasha|thorachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thorachshĂ«sha|thorachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thorachrosha|thorachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thorachmusha|thorachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thorachyasha|thorachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothorachnkshĂ«sha|gothorachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothorachnkrosha|gothorachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothorachnkmusha|gothorachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothorachnkyasha|gothorachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thorarachasha|thorarachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thorarachshĂ«sha|thorarachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thorarachrosha|thorarachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thorarachmusha|thorarachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thorarachyasha|thorarachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothorarachnkshĂ«sha|gothorarachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothorarachnkrosha|gothorarachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothorarachnkmusha|gothorarachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothorarachnkyasha|gothorarachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:therĂŠchasha|therĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:therĂŠchshĂ«sha|therĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:therĂŠchrosha|therĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:therĂŠchmusha|therĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:therĂŠchyasha|therĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotherĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gotherĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotherĂŠchnkrosha|gotherĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotherĂŠchnkmusha|gotherĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotherĂŠchnkyasha|gotherĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thorfachasha|thorfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thorfachshĂ«sha|thorfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thorfachrosha|thorfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thorfachmusha|thorfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thorfachyasha|thorfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothorfachnkshĂ«sha|gothorfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothorfachnkrosha|gothorfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothorfachnkmusha|gothorfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothorfachnkyasha|gothorfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
